disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Excessive thirst and passing large volumes of urine for the past month
trigger_question_examples: Has he been drinking or urinating more than usual?
Any change in thirst or how often he passes urine?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — for about a month he's been constantly thirsty and going to the toilet all the time, day and night.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Rapid decline over 48 hours into drowsiness, confusion and inability to stand or self-care
trigger_question_examples: When did he last seem himself?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: In the last two days he's become really foggy and confused, sleeping most of the time, and he can't get out of bed or look after himself.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: He has hardly been able to drink today while still passing a lot of urine
trigger_question_examples: Is he managing to keep fluids down?
Has he been able to drink today?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, he can barely take a sip, but he's still needing to wee a lot — I'm worried he's drying out.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Slate-grey / bronze discolouration of the skin developing gradually over the past year
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any change in his skin colour?
Any darkening or bronzing of the skin?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, his skin has slowly gone a bronze, greyish colour over the last year, especially his face and arms.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Aching, painful knuckles of both hands (the joints where the fingers meet the hand)
trigger_question_examples: Is it the knuckles or the finger joints?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's the big knuckles of both hands where the fingers join the hand — they're swollen and ache badly.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A dull ache under the right ribs
trigger_question_examples: Any pain in the tummy, especially under the right ribs?
Any discomfort over the liver area?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There's a dull ache under his right ribs, not sharp, just there.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recent loss of sex drive and difficulty with erections
trigger_question_examples: Has there been any change in sex drive or sexual function?
Sometimes these illnesses affect libido — has he noticed anything?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He did quietly mention he's lost interest in sex and has been having trouble with erections lately.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: He's a bit embarrassed to talk about that.
